signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**  
CoinShares data confirms XRP led digital asset inflows with $119.6 million last week—its strongest since mid-December 2025—driving a 5.52% price rise to $1.38 amid a U.S.-Iran ceasefire rally and XRP treasury merger progress.[1]
